pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 11-23 creates domain with virtualmin; export_result.sh uses this domain
setup_task.sh lines 26-34 creates file at this path; export_result.sh line 12 confirms target file
setup_task.sh lines 55-68 creates status.php; export_result.sh line 13 confirms URL
setup_task.sh line 79 sets initial perms to 777 (broken state); export_result.sh line 19 checks for 644; verifier.py line 46 validates 644 is expected
setup_task.sh lines 15,21-22 set password to GymAnything123!; setup_task.sh line 40 shows initial broken password is WrongPass123; export_result.sh line 30 checks for GymAnything123!
setup_task.sh line 64 echoes this string on successful DB connection; export_result.sh line 49 checks for this string; verifier.py validates it

privileged_info_summary: The task fixes database connection permissions and passwords on the acmecorp.test domain. The db_config.php file is located at /home/acmecorp/public_html/includes/db_config.php and must have permissions changed from 777 (broken) to 644 (secure). The database password must be set to GymAnything123! (initially wrong as WrongPass123). When fixed, the status page at http://acmecorp.test/status.php displays 'System Operational'. All data is synthetic, created by the setup scripts for the Virtualmin task environment.
